world.name: Classic High Fantasy
world.story_notes: CHARACTER BACKSTORY — Kel Stormblessed: Kel Stormblessed, a Half-Elf Warlock, bears the weight of tragedy in his deep, expressive eyes — one marred by a jagged scar that serves as a constant reminder of the devilish massacre that claimed his town. His dark hair, streaked with silver, falls to his shoulders, framing a face that, while not classically handsome, holds an undeniable charm. Kel stands at an average height, his build lean and muscular from years of survival and vengeance. His skin, fair and unblemished save for the scar, seems to hold a faint, otherworldly glow, a testament to his pact with the archdevil Mephistopheles. Kel's demeanor is guarded, his trust hard-won, a result of his lonely quest for power and retribution. He carries the weight of his past like a physical burden, but his spirit remains unbroken, fueled by the promise of justice and the faint hope of finding love in this harsh world.

history_log.event: Kel Stormblessed created. Warlock (The Fiend) Level 1. Adventure begins.
